scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w desktop && node scratch/generate-licenses.js
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.desktop:start: npm run build && npm run start -w desktop
scripts.ci:verify: npm run build && npm test && npm run db:smoke && npm run wi4:smoke && npm run wi5:smoke && npm run wi6:smoke && npm run wi7:smoke && npm run wi8-wi9:smoke && npm run wi10:smoke && npm run desktop:preflight
